_comment: Critic IDENTITIES only — public facts (name, platform, URL). No opinions/takes live here. seed-critic.ts creates a critic row from this the first time it ingests that critic's CSV of real, sourced takes. A critic with no CSV is never created (no empty critic pages).

dave-portnoy.name: Dave Portnoy
dave-portnoy.bio: Barstool founder whose One Bite pizza reviews score every slice on a 0-10 scale.

keith-lee.name: Keith Lee
keith-lee.bio: TikTok food critic known for scored, no-frills reviews and city food tours.

jeremy-jahns.name: Jeremy Jahns
jeremy-jahns.bio: Prolific YouTube movie reviewer with a signature tier scale from Awesometacular down.

chris-stuckmann.name: Chris Stuckmann
chris-stuckmann.bio: Letter-grade YouTube movie reviewer, now also a filmmaker.

critical-drinker.name: The Critical Drinker
critical-drinker.bio: Sharply opinionated YouTube movie critic; verdicts, not numeric scores.

acg.name: ACG (Jeremy Penter)
acg.bio: Game reviewer whose verdicts are Buy, Wait for Sale, or Never Touch.

skill-up.name: Skill Up (Ralph Panebianco)
skill-up.bio: Weekly game reviews with explicit recommend / do-not-recommend verdicts.

angryjoe.name: AngryJoe (Joe Vargas)
angryjoe.bio: Long-running video game reviews scored out of 10.
